opener.dateline:
Legation of the United States,
Port au Prince, Haiti, December 15, 1899.

div.p: Sir: In reply to the cablegram received to-day I do not understand what the Department requests. I forwarded in dispatch No. 166, of December 5, 1899, all the information that was in my possession concerning the Ozama Bridge award. I am awaiting instructions from the Department in reference to it, and what steps I shall take in the recognition of the present Government.

Up to the present time I have received no information from that Government of its existence, nor has either of my colleagues here. I do not care to assume this responsibility without full instructions from the Department.
